heading: Interagency and international support authority
label: 2323a Interagency and international support authority
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Water Resources Development Act of 1996, and not as part of the Water Resources Development Act of 1986 which comprises this chapter.

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary may engage in activities (including contracting) in support of Federal departments or agencies, nongovernmental organizations, international organizations, or foreign governments to address problems of national significance to the United States.

children.heading: Consultation
children.label: b Consultation
children.text: The Secretary may engage in activities in support of international organizations or foreign governments only after consulting with the Department of State.

children.heading: Use of Corps’ expertise
children.label: c Use of Corps’ expertise
children.text: The Secretary may use the technical and managerial expertise, including the planning and design expertise, of the Corps of Engineers to address domestic and international problems related to water resources, infrastructure development, and environmental protection and restoration.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section $2,500,000 for fiscal year 2008 and each fiscal year thereafter.

children.heading: Acceptance of funds
children.label: 2 Acceptance of funds
children.text: The Secretary may accept and expend additional funds from Federal departments or agencies, nongovernmental organizations, international organizations, or foreign governments to carry out this section.
